Meng Dai еӯҹеІұ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Meng Dai (еӯҹеІұ). Warned Yuan Shao that Shen Pei planned to rebel but Shen Pei was too loyal. Meng Dai was affiliated with Yuan Shao.
